race.comment: OUR BRAVE LINI (15) resumes here but the form she showed in her first preparation was good enough to feature in a race of this calibre. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the outcome. JAM PACKED (5) is unlucky to still be a maiden hitting the top-five in all 11 career outings to date and this is not an overly strong affair. Has to be included. LEGAL CAUSE (1) has been thereabouts in all three starts this time in work and will be at peak fitness for this. Bold showing expected. CARAMELFUDGESUNDAE (11) has placed three of her past four and is a must for the multiples. WATCHYA LANGUAGE (9) best of the rest with the claim.
